title: Annotation Processing & Code Generation
description: Compile-time annotation processor pipeline: entity component generation, remote-call stub generation, logic statement I/O, and asset region loading. All processors extend BaseProcessor which extends AbstractProcessor.

lifecycle: init(ProcessingEnvironment): initializes Trees, Types, Elements, Filer, Messager; sets rootDirectory from CLASS_OUTPUT path
process(Set<TypeElement>, RoundEnvironment): guards on round counter (round++ >= rounds → return false); resolves rootDirectory on first call; delegates to abstract process(RoundEnvironment)
key_utilities: write(TypeSpec.Builder): sorts superinterfaces/methods/fields, builds JavaFile via JavaPoet, writes via Filer.createSourceFile()
write(TypeSpec.Builder, Seq<String> imports): same + injects sorted custom imports after package declaration
elements/types/fields/methods(Class<Annotation>): query RoundEnvironment and wrap results in Selement/Stype/Svar/Smethod wrappers
err(String, Element): reports ERROR via Messager + Log
isPrimitive, typeSize, getDefault, simpleName, tname: static helpers for type manipulation

processors.name: EntityProcess

state.varInitializers: ObjectMap<String, String> — field descriptor → init expression
state.methodBlocks: ObjectMap<String, String> — method descriptor → body source text

activity_flow: Accumulate: allGroups += elements(@GroupDef), allDefs += elements(@EntityDef), allInterfaces += types(@EntityInterface)
FOR each baseComponent: extract varInitializers (field init expressions via AST) and methodBlocks (method body source text)
FOR each baseComponent: register in componentNames map
FOR each @EntityInterface: build interface TypeSpec, call write(inter)
SPECIAL CASE: components with @EntityDef get no base class — generated class IS the base
Inject field initializers into interface builders where varInitializers contains key
YES → Round 2: Build group accessors and entity classes
FOR each @GroupDef: build GroupDefinition(name, bestType, components, spatial, mapping, collides)
Build group accessor interface TypeSpec, call write(accessor)
Resolve components = getComponents(type) [recursive, cache in defComponents]
Resolve groups = groupDefs where all group.components ⊆ entity.components
Build entity class TypeSpec.Builder with fields from all components
FOR each component field: inject initializer from varInitializers if present
SPECIAL CASE 'add'/'remove': inject group add/remove code for each matching GroupDefinition
IF abstract/native or no methodBlock: skip; ELSE inject methodBlock source
Build reset() method with field defaults from varInitializers or getDefault()
Store EntityDefinition(name, builder, type, baseClass, components, groups, fieldSpecs, legacy)
FOR each GroupDefinition: write group class stubs
YES → Round 3: Finalize and write entity & component classes
FOR each EntityDefinition: collect imports from component method bodies
FOR each EntityDefinition: call write(def.builder, imports)
FOR each EntityDefinition with legacy flag: write legacy wrapper class
helper_methods: getComponent(String name) → Stype: lookup from componentNames
getComponents(Selement type) → Seq<Stype>: recursive resolution via defComponents cache; always appends baseComponents
getDependencies(Stype component) → Seq<Stype>: resolves component interface deps recursively; caches in componentDependencies
inner_classes: GroupDefinition: name, bestType(ClassName), components(Seq<Stype>), spatial, mapping, collides, manualInclusions
EntityDefinition: name, builder, naming(Selement), extend(TypeName), components, groups, fieldSpec, legacy

processors.name: RemoteProcess
activity_flow: VALIDATE: must be public AND static → err() if not
VALIDATE: annotation.targets() != Loc.none → err() if none
packetName = capitalize(method.name()) + 'CallPacket' [+ disambiguator index if collision]
CREATE MethodEntry(callLocation, qualifiedMethodName, packetName, targets, variants, called, unreliable, forward, methodID++, element, priority)

processors.name: CallGenerator
activity_flow: FOR each MethodEntry ent in methods:
IF ent.priority != normal: override getPriority() → return priority.ordinal()
makeWriter(packet, ent, serializer): generates write(Writes) — iterates params, writes primitives inline or via serializer.getNetWriter()
makeReader(packet, ent, serializer): generates read(Reads,int) — stores DATA=READ.b(LENGTH); generates handled() — sets BAIS.setBytes(DATA), reads each param from READ
IF ent.where.isClient: add handleClient() via writeHandleMethod(ent, false)
IF ent.where.isServer: add handleServer() via writeHandleMethod(ent, true)
IF NOT (isClient AND isServer): add allow(boolean server) to restrict direction
ADD fields to packet for each param (skip first param if server method)
IF isClient OR target.isAll: writeCallMethod(callBuilder, ent, toAll=true, forwarded=false)
IF isServer AND target.isOne: writeCallMethod(callBuilder, ent, toAll=false, forwarded=false)
IF isServer AND forward: writeCallMethod(callBuilder, ent, toAll=true, forwarded=true)
key_generated_classes: Call — public class with static send methods per @Remote method

processors.name: LogicStatementProcessor
activity_flow: CREATE LogicIO class builder with public modifiers
CREATE write(Object obj, StringBuilder out) method builder
CREATE read(String[] tokens, int length) → LStatement method builder
ADD static field allStatements: Seq<Prov<LStatement>> initialized with all registered types' ::new refs
FOR each Stype c in types:
WRITE branch: if/else-if on obj.getClass() == c.class → append name + each field value (enums use .name())
READ branch: if/else-if on tokens[0].equals(name) → new instance, assign each field from tokens[i+1] using valueOf or direct string assign; call result.afterRead(); return result
Add write() and read() to LogicIO type
processors.generated_class: LogicIO — static write(Object, StringBuilder) and read(String[], int) dispatch methods for all @RegisterStatement types

processors.name: LoadRegionProcessor
activity_flow: CREATE loadRegions(MappableContent content) static method builder
fieldMap = ObjectMap<Stype, Seq<Svar>> — group @Load fields by enclosing type
VALIDATE: must be public → err() if not
entries = fieldMap.keys() sorted by type name
FOR each Stype type in entries:
fields = fieldMap.get(type) sorted by field name
VALIDATE dims == lengths.length → err() if mismatch
FOR each dimension: beginControlFlow for-loop INDEX0, INDEX1...
processors.parse_helper: parse(String value): interpolates @→content.name, @size→block.size, #1/#2/#→INDEX0/INDEX1 into Java string concatenation expressions
processors.generated_class: ContentRegions — static loadRegions(MappableContent) dispatches on content type to populate TextureRegion fields via Core.atlas.find()

key_relationships: EntityProcess uses EntityIO for write/read/sync method body generation
CallGenerator uses SerializerResolver.locate() to find per-param serializers
All processors call BaseProcessor.write(TypeSpec.Builder) to emit Java files via JavaPoet + Filer
important_notes: EntityProcess runs 3 rounds (rounds=3); others run 1 round (default)
BaseProcessor.process() increments round counter and skips if round > rounds
All processors accumulate annotation elements in allGroups/allDefs/allInterfaces across rounds (EntityProcess)
JavaPoet (TypeSpec, MethodSpec, FieldSpec, JavaFile) used throughout for code generation
All output goes to mindustry.gen package
TypeIOResolver.resolve() scans @TypeIOHandler annotations to build the serializer map used by RemoteProcess and EntityProcess
SerializerResolver.locate() determines which serializer to use per parameter in CallGenerator
LoadRegionProcessor parse() supports dynamic tokens: @ (content.name), @size (block.size), # / #1 / #2 (array indices)
